div.t-attf-class: css_quantity input-group {{'d-none' if combination_info['prevent_zero_price_sale'] else 'd-inline-flex order-first'}} align-middle border

a.class: css_quantity_minus btn btn-link pe-2 js_add_cart_json border-0
a.title: Eliminar uno
a.name: remove_one

a.class: css_quantity_plus btn btn-link ps-2 js_add_cart_json border-0
a.title: Agregar uno
